violations.text: Grout was observed in poor repair by the dishwasher. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2026
The tile floor by the dishwasher has areas of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

The soap dispenser for the kitchen hand sink was observed placed over the clean dish area on the sanitize side of the three bay. Hand soap dispenser must be moved to eliminated splash zone. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on the stand up 2 door freezer were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2024
Main dishwasher unit was not in good repair. Service was called day before inspection. Establishment is using 3 bay sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023

The floor under the dishwasher area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The coving under the] dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023
